Example

Enum SeriesModality

Namespace
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.Types
Assembly
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.Types.dll

The enumeration of series modalities.

public enum SeriesModality

Fields

CT = 0

Computed Tomography (CT).

MR = 1

Magnetic Resonance (MR).

Other = 8

Other.

PT = 2

Positron Emission Tomography (PET).

REG = 7

Registration.

RTDOSE = 6

Radiotherapy Dose.

RTIMAGE = 3

Radiotherapy Image.

RTPLAN = 5

Radiotherapy Plan.

RTSTRUCT = 4

Radiotherapy Structure Set.
